interaction_phrase: earned us the trust of major U.S. government agencies
occurrence_sentence: ColdQuanta's success in delivering advanced systems in prior projects, such as our Cold Atom Laboratory system on board the International Space Station, has earned us the trust of major U.S. government agencies and national labs

"ColdQuanta's success in delivering advanced systems in prior projects, such as our Cold Atom Laboratory system on board the International Space Station, has earned us the trust of major U.S. government agencies and national labs," said Bo Ewald, CEO of ColdQuanta.
DARPA awarded ColdQuanta $721k in partnership with the University of Virginia under its A-PhI (Atomic-Photonic Integration) program.
